merchant_quotes.no-merchant-here: The marketplace is empty of any willing trader.
merchant_quotes.merchant-item-unavailable: I'm sorry, I don't have that item.
merchant_quotes.merchant-out-of-stock: I'm afraid we've sold the last of that for now.
merchant_quotes.merchant-insufficient-coins: You'll need a heavier purse for that one.
merchant_quotes.merchant-not-carrying: I can only bargain for what you are actually carrying.

simple_messages.unknown-command: Those words carry no meaning here.
simple_messages.player-not-found: No ally by that exact name is here.
simple_messages.already-fighting: You are already locked in battle.
simple_messages.not-enough-mana: Your inner reserves are too thin for that spell.
simple_messages.not-enough-vigor: Your body lacks the vigor for that effort just now.
simple_messages.cannot-go: The way does not open for you there.
simple_messages.current-room-not-found: The world around you wavers strangely for a moment.
simple_messages.item-not-usable: That would not serve you in that way.
simple_messages.item-not-equippable: That would not serve you in that way.
simple_messages.item-not-wearable: That would not serve you in that way.
simple_messages.item-not-wieldable: That would not serve you in that way.
simple_messages.item-not-holdable: That would not serve you in that way.
simple_messages.no-ground-coins: Not a single coin glints at your feet.
